sourcesContent:
# do-IIFE: `do ->` invokes immediately; `do <expr>` invokes any
# expression. Identifier-param capture lives OUTSIDE this byte corpus
# (passing no arguments would leave the params
# undefined); the default-param and parameterless forms byte-match.
calls = []
do ->
  calls.push(1)
  calls.push(2)
x = do -> 40 + 2
y = do (n = 5) ->
  n * 2
mk = -> 7
z = do mk
w = do -> do -> 9
composed = (do -> 3) + (do -> 4)
